examples: Abdul Hussein has a 15-2 professional record.
Abdul Hussein secured a violent finish over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam six months ago.
Abdul Hussein lost to Muhammad Mokaev.
Cody Gibson had never been knocked out in over 30 professional fights prior to being knocked down by Richie Lencz.
Cody Gibson's chin is questionable following his 21-second knockout loss to Aoriqileng.
Cody Gibson was brutally starched in the first round by Ricky Leute eight months ago.
Abdul Hussein utilizes karate and taekwondo-esque light footwork, bouncing in and out of range and charging in with the backhand.
Abdul Hussein controls the lead hand well and works off it when fighting in the southpaw stance.
Abdul Hussein can be countered because of the risks he takes while fighting in close.
Cody Gibson is a tall lanky guy for the bantamweight division and uses his length well with a good jab and teeps.
Cody Gibson gets backed up to the cage, which takes the sting off his shots and allows opponents to negate his range.
Cody Gibson is hitable and tends to make mistakes on the ground.
Cody Gibson is a good grappler with solid wrestling fundamentals and is very active from his back with scrambles and elbows.
Cody Gibson lacks the strength at 38 years old to control other bantamweights in the clinch or grappling exchanges.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight and making weight on short notice while traveling from the United States to Abu Dhabi.
claims.quote: Cody Gibson is taking this on short notice and also Cody Gibson not only needs to take the fight on short notice, make the weight on short notice, he also needs to go from the United States to Abu Dhabi

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice and traveling down to the Middle East.
claims.quote: traveling all the way down to the Middle East to take on someone who's going to be getting a lot of crowd support.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson has questionable cardio.
claims.quote: One of which I've always worried about, that's the cardio.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson lacks the cardio to keep up anymore at 38 years old.
claims.quote: Cody Gibson just doesn't have the cardio to keep up anymore. He's 38 years old.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson was knocked out by Archie Colgan in 21 seconds in his last fight.
claims.quote: he did get knocked out by Archie Long at only 21 seconds in his last one.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and in the final phase of his career.
claims.quote: 38 years old kind of in that final phase

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is nearly 39 years of age with a record of 21 and 12.
claims.quote: while Cody Gibson's almost 39 years of age, you know, he's 21 and 12

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and coming off two straight losses by finish.
claims.quote: 38 years old coming off two straight losses by finish and the last one was a quick KO loss to Archi Long.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is 0-3 in the UFC on his current run.
claims.quote: He's 0 and3 in the UFC on his new run back.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson has been finished six times in his career and is 38 years old.
claims.quote: Cody Gibson's been finished, I believe, six times in his career. He's now 38 years old.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and coming off a brutal first-minute knockout loss.
claims.quote: 38 years old at bantamweight coming off of a brutal knockout loss in the first minute.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson ignores defense entirely and throws naked calf kicks, which has previously cost him and led to a knockout loss.
claims.quote: The fact that he throws naked calf kicks has cost him a few times now, including getting him knocked out in his last fight. He really just does straight up ignore defense in its entirety.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is a very good wrestler who gets multiple takedowns in his wins and pushes a high striking pace.
claims.quote: Gibson is a very good wrestler. He does get multiple takedowns in the fights that he does win. he can put a very high pace on in the striking.

claims.claim: Abdullah Hussein has very bad takedown accuracy.
claims.quote: he does shoot a lot of takedowns, but he has a very, very bad takedown accuracy.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has a speed edge over Cody Gibson on the feet due to his Southpaw stance and kickboxing game.
claims.quote: I feel like striking wise, little bit of that speed edge over the Cody Gibson side. Kind of a bladed karate striking stance... and it's smooth.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein is faster than Cody Gibson with better scrambles and wrestling.
claims.quote: Hussein just seems faster than him. Better scrambles, better wrestling.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson's chin is questionable following his 21-second knockout loss to Aoriqileng.
claims.quote: Gibson's chin don't know where it's at because of his last loss where he got knocked out by our kilong in 20 seconds.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson was brutally starched in the first round by Ricky Leute eight months ago.
claims.quote: going out there and getting brutally starched early in the fight by a Richie Long um in in the very first round eight months ago.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson's ability to take damage is starting to lessen.
claims.quote: His ability to take damage is certainly starting to lessen.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson's chin is in question after getting sparked by Long.
claims.quote: The chin could be in question at this point after getting sparked by Long.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson lacks the strength at 38 years old to control other bantamweights in the clinch or grappling exchanges.
claims.quote: At 38, I don't think Gibson's all that strong anymore. Again, I try to say that respectfully.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has a 15-2 professional record.
claims.quote: This is a 15-2 professional fighter.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein secured a violent finish over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam six months ago.
claims.quote: And his most recent victory 6 months ago was against a former UFC guy in Tyson Nam to where he violently uh put him away.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein went 8-0 as an amateur, including winning the 2015 IMAF European Championship and 2016 IMAF World Championship.
claims.quote: he went 8-0 as an amateur and that included he was the 2015 IMAF European champ, the 2016 IMAF World Champ.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has notable wins over fighters like Tyson Nam.
claims.quote: Abdul Hussein, who has notable wins um over guys like Tyson Nam.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has a 93% finishing rate on the regional scene.
claims.quote: He's a dangerous prospect with a 93% finishing rate. He's got like a record of I think it was 15-2 on the regional scene.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has 15 wins with 14 coming inside the distance.
claims.quote: this guy has 15 wins. 14 of them come inside the distance.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has nine wins by submission and five knockouts.
claims.quote: Most of his wins coming by submission, nine total. He's also got five knockouts.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein's only career losses are to Muhammad Mokaev and Nariman Abbasov.
claims.quote: And the only career losses for Abdul Hussein are Mame, sorry, Muhammad Mokayv back in 2021 in Brave and Narwas Abska in Brave in 2018.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson has consistently struggled with grappling throughout his career.
claims.quote: Cody Gibson, who has really struggled with the grappling throughout the years.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson slows down as he gets older and can make mistakes in the grappling.
claims.quote: Cody Gibson's a guy that as he's getting old, he can slow down. He can make mistakes in the grappling.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has strong and tricky overall grappling skills.
claims.quote: He's pretty tricky when it comes to the overall grappling though. And I think that's going to be his main path to victory

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein had a competitive fight against Muhammad Mokaev earlier in their careers and was able to take Mokaev down.
claims.quote: even though Hussein lost that fight, it was rather competitive at at moments, right? We saw Abdul taking down Muhammad Makay.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein is small for the 135-pound weight class at only 5'5".
claims.quote: The only thing that I would say that could potentially be a negative for him at 135 pounds is this guy is small for this weight class. He's only 5'5, right?

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein utilizes karate and taekwondo-esque light footwork, bouncing in and out of range and charging in with the backhand.
claims.quote: Kind of karate taekwond doesque with the light footwork. Charges in with the backhand.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein controls the lead hand well and works off it when fighting in the southpaw stance.
claims.quote: When he stands in the southpaw stance like he did against Tyson Nom, he controls that lead hand real well.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has high-level wrestling, pace, and cardio.
claims.quote: his wrestling is legit, his pace is legit, his cardio is legit

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein takes pro boxing matches in his free time to improve his striking.
claims.quote: he's taking pro boxing matches in his free time to really hone that part of his game.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein trains out of Finland with a good team.
claims.quote: training out of Finland, he's got a good team around him.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson had never been knocked out in over 30 professional fights prior to being knocked down by Richie Lencz.
claims.quote: Gibson had never been knocked out. His entire career, 30 plus fights, never been knocked out. Last time out against a Richie Lang, knocked down 21 seconds.

claims.claim: Gibson suffered a brutal knockout in his fight against Orici Lang eight months ago.
claims.quote: that's like a fight changing uh knockout that he took against Orici Lang back what was that, eight months ago.

claims.claim: Gibson is declining rapidly in performance after starting out okay in recent fights.
claims.quote: he starts out okay and then he's just absolutely falling off a cliff.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein is physically smaller than his UFC listed height, measuring closer to 5 foot 5 or 5 foot 4.
claims.quote: He's more like a 5 foot five, 5 foot4 kind of guy.

claims.claim: Gibson is 38 years old and struggling with the physicality of weight cuts at his age.
claims.quote: Gibson has kind of shown that like at the ripe bold age of what 38 years old like I don't think those weight cuts are getting any easier.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has skills in all aspects of the game and looks like a legitimate prospect.
claims.quote: Usain looks like the real deal to me. The guy looked good. He's got skills in all aspects of the game.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has fought good competition like Muhammad Mokaev and Tyson Nam.
claims.quote: He's fought Muhammad Makaya. He's fought Tyson Dam, you know, guys that have been in the UFC.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has knockout power in his hands and good combinations.
claims.quote: Some knockout power in his hands and some good combinations. I like the way he rips the body.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has explosive hand speed, knockout power, a dangerous submission game, and is an aggressive combination striker.
claims.quote: Abdul Hussein for those who don't know, explosive hand speed, real knockout power, dangerous submission game, and definitely an aggressive combination striker

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has tons of power on the feet, good wrestling, good grappling, and decent cardio.
claims.quote: tons of power in the feet, good wrestling, good grappling. The cardio ain't half bad.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has insane power and is a really good wrestler and grappler.
claims.quote: this guy's power is insane, but not only that, he's a really good wrestler, and he's a phenomenal grappler as well.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has very heavy hands and uses ground and pound to open up submissions or finish fights.
claims.quote: he's mainly a grappler, but he does actually have very heavy hands. He tries to get to the body lock and then just find trips or throws from there. On the ground, he uses ground and pound to open up subs or just end the fight

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is five inches taller than Abdul Hussein.
claims.quote: He's tall, too. Five inches taller, which I think is a factor, right?

claims.claim: Cody Gibson has a good wrestling background and is taller with a reach advantage.
claims.quote: good wrestling uh background, and definitely a vet in the game. Um, in this fight, guys, he is a lot taller than um Abdul Hussein, Cody Gibson, that is, but none of that's going to matter. He does have a reach advantage

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein's grappling was competitive when he fought Muhammad Mokaev.
claims.quote: His grappling was competitive with Mohamed Makaya. He was scoring some takedowns.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is a tall lanky guy for the bantamweight division and uses his length well with a good jab and teeps.
claims.quote: He's a good striker, uses his length really well. He's a tall lanky guy for the division and he uses it as such. Good jab, good teeps

claims.claim: Cody Gibson gets backed up to the cage, which takes the sting off his shots and allows opponents to negate his range.
claims.quote: the problem is he does get backed up and that can cost him a lot because when you're getting backed up and you're this tall lanky fellow, it takes a lot of the sting off your shots and also it gets them to back you up to the cage where they can negate some of that range.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is hitable and tends to make mistakes on the ground.
claims.quote: He's always been hitable. He's always made a lot of mistakes in the mat.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson is a good grappler with solid wrestling fundamentals and is very active from his back with scrambles and elbows.
claims.quote: He's a good grappler, too. He's got really solid wrestling fundamentals. He's a good back taker and even if he's on his back, he's very active from his back. Scrambles really well, nasty elbows in the ground and pound.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has a solid choke arsenal and can snatch up various chokes from anywhere.
claims.quote: He's got a solid choke arsenal. He can snatch up various chokes from pretty much anywhere.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein lost to Muhammad Mokaev.
claims.quote: He also lost to Muhammad Makayv. He's one of the two guys to beat Abdul Hussein

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein was originally scheduled to fight on the Ultimate Fighter and later booked against Muin Gaffarov before Gaffarov pulled out.
claims.quote: Hussein was scheduled to fight on the Ultimate Fighter... He was then booked against Muin Gaffarov. Gaffroof have to pull out.

claims.claim: Cody Gibson's long limbs pose grappling and length advantages that make him difficult to keep down.
claims.quote: those long limbs can cause problems, pose issues potentially on the mat.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein can be countered because of the risks he takes while fighting in close.
claims.quote: He definitely can be countered because the risks he takes while in close

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein has been outgrappled in a few past fights despite grappling being his main game plan.
claims.quote: he has been outgrappled a few times surprisingly despite it being his main game plan.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein hasn't fought MMA since December of 2025.
claims.quote: hasn't fought MMA since December of 2025.
